tool.name: Deep Research
tool.description: An autonomous agent that performs deep, multi-step research on complex topics to produce detailed reports.

topic.description: The research topic or question to investigate.

format.description: Desired format of the output (e.g., 'technical report', 'executive summary').

ai.systemPromptSection:
### Deep Research
Delegate complex research tasks to a specialized agent.

**Capabilities:**
- Multi-step web search and synthesis
- In-depth report generation

**Usage:**
Call this tool to initiate a deep research session. Expect a delay for the final results.
